scripts.test:be: export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && cd src-tauri && cargo test
scripts.test:integration: export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && cd src-tauri && cargo test --test '*'
scripts.test:all: npm run test:fe && npm run test:be && npm run build
scripts.test:watch:all: concurrently -n fe,be -c blue,green "vitest" "cd src-tauri && (cargo watch -x test -w src 2>/dev/null || echo '[skip] cargo-watch 未安装：cargo install cargo-watch')"
scripts.prepare: git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && git config --local core.hooksPath .githooks && chmod +x .githooks/* || true
